raw.description: Remove permanent ban on a player

raw.description: Removes a player from their current platoon.

raw.description: Remove a temporary ban from a player.

raw.description: Remove VIP status from a player.

raw.name: RemoveWarmupTimer
raw.description: Remove warmup timer override for a specific game mode.

commands.description: 重置投票踢人阈值为默认值

raw.name: ResetVoteKickThreshold
raw.description: Remove custom vote to kick thresholds and revert to default.

commands.description: 向服务器发送全局广播消息

constraints.hint: fire-and-forget: 服务器不返回响应，发送即视为成功

raw.name: ServerBroadcast
raw.description: Create a message to broadcast to the server.

commands.description: 启用或禁用队伍自动平衡

raw.name: SetAutoBalanceEnabled
raw.description: Enable or disable the auto balance.

commands.description: 设置自动平衡触发的人数差值阈值

constraints.hint: 双方人数差触发自动平衡的阈值

raw.name: SetAutoBalanceThreshold
raw.description: Set the threshold value for teams when using auto balance.

commands.description: 启用或禁用指定地图的动态天气效果

raw.name: SetDynamicWeatherEnabled
raw.description: Enable or disable dynamic weather for a specific map.

commands.description: 设置高延迟踢人阈值（毫秒）

raw.name: SetHighPingThreshold
raw.description: Set the ping (in ms) that is considered too high for smooth gameplay.

commands.description: 设置玩家挂机踢出等待时长（分钟）

parameters.name: Set Idle Kick Duration in Minutes

constraints.hint: 分钟；服务器硬限制最大约 184 分钟

raw.name: SetIdleKickDuration
raw.description: Set how long a player can be idle before being kicked.

dialogueParameters.name: Set Idle Kick Duration in Minutes

commands.description: 启用或禁用地图队列随机排序

raw.name: SetMapShuffleEnabled
raw.description: Randomises the server map queue

commands.description: 设置指定游戏模式的比赛时长（分钟）。Warfare: 30~180，Offensive: 10~60/每点，Skirmish: 10~60

constraints.hint: 分钟；实际可用值因服务器配置而异

raw.name: SetMatchTimer
raw.description: Configure the match length in minutes for a specific game-mode. Warfare can be between 30 - 180 minutes. Offensive can be between 10 - 60 minutes per capture point. Skirmish can be between 10 - 60 minutes

commands.description: 设置服务器最大排队玩家数

raw.name: SetMaxQueuedPlayers
raw.description: Set the maximum number of queued players.

commands.description: 配置当前地图的活跃战区布局

constraints.hint: 据点名称；数量因地图而异。错误格式可能导致服务器异常

raw.name: SetSectorLayout
raw.description: Configure the active sector layout

commands.description: 设置换队冷却时间

constraints.hint: 秒，0=无冷却；大值可能被服务器拒绝

raw.name: SetTeamSwitchCooldown
raw.description: Set cooldown time for team switching.

commands.description: 设置服务器 VIP 预留槽位数量

raw.name: SetVipSlotCount
raw.description: Set the VIP slot count for the server.

commands.description: 启用或禁用投票踢人功能

raw.name: SetVoteKickEnabled
raw.description: Enable or disable the vote to kick functionality.

commands.description: 设置投票踢人通过阈值

constraints.hint: 投票踢人所需票数，有服务器最小限制

raw.name: SetVoteKickThreshold
raw.description: Set the vote to kick threshold.

commands.description: 设置指定游戏模式的热身时长（1~10 分钟）

constraints.hint: 分钟；实际可用值因服务器配置而异

raw.name: SetWarmupTimer
raw.description: Override the length of the warmup timer for a specific game-mode between 1 to 10 minutes.

commands.description: 设置服务器欢迎消息

raw.name: SetWelcomeMessage
raw.description: Send a message to the server.

commands.description: 临时封禁指定玩家，可设置封禁时长

raw.name: TemporaryBanPlayer
raw.description: Temporary ban a player from the server
